title: Board Card Operational Language
scope: Bring lifecycle state to running cards.
Make compact cards explain current work state.
Keep quick actions visible in compact and standard cards.
non_goals: Do not remove existing card size controls.
Do not add dense dashboard panels inside cards.
Do not change Team task persistence.

tasks.title: Add lifecycle badge and reason line
tasks.details: Render lifecycle state and reason on Board cards using concise language.

tasks.title: Add recent tool chips
tasks.details: Show recent tools from lifecycle evidence when available.

tasks.title: Keep Cmd/Cmp/Git quick actions visible
tasks.details: Wired board quick-action controls so compact titlebars and standard board top actions include Cmd/Cmp/Git/Codex/Terminal quick buttons with stable data attributes.

tasks.title: Highlight needs_attention cards
tasks.details: Use needs_attention lifecycle state to visually identify handoff candidates.

tasks.title: Add card overflow checks
tasks.details: Protect compact card layout from overlapping badges, actions, and reason text.

acceptance: A user can decide wait, inspect, continue, or intervene from the card alone.
No text overlap on compact cards.
Cmp 0 is visibly neutral and not styled like an error.
Lifecycle evidence links naturally to Inspector or Trace.

implementation_notes.summary: Added a lifecycle badge and concise reason line to board cards so compact and standard cards expose operational state from thread summaries.
Added capped recent-tool chips to the board lifecycle strip from thread.lifecycle.recent_tools, with compact cards limited to two chips.
Kept Cmd/Cmp/Git quick actions visible by integrating the board quick-action helper into compact titlebars and standard board top actions, and allowing action rows to wrap.
Added needs_attention card marker (`needs-attention-card`) in board card rendering and a subtle card-level visual treatment for handoff candidates.
Added compact-card CSS constraints (min-width:0, ellipsis clipping, bounded strip width) to prevent title/name/tool/chase-row overflow and preserve badge/reason readability.

verification_results.result: failed (web_search_call assertion in standard board output did not match expected truncation)
verification_results.notes: Expected compact-only truncation for recent tool chips; assertion was adjusted.
